name: file_edit
description: Replace all occurrences of a literal string in a file

path.description: Relative path to the file to edit (must be relative, not absolute)

execution.command_template:
python3 <<'PYEOF'
path = '{{path}}'
old = '''{{old_string}}'''
new = '''{{new_string}}'''
import sys
content = open(path).read()
result = content.replace(old, new)
if result == content and old:
    sys.exit(1)
open(path, 'w').write(result)
PYEOF
